channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: 3DMAX Eliminated from Cologne Major Contention; B8, Monte & M80 Qualify
item.content:encoded:
In a bumper day of local Counter-Strike LANs, which saw several tournaments played across Asia, Europe, and the Americas, the VRS picture for the IEM Cologne 2026 Major cutoff is solidifying.

Dozens of rosters are fighting it out to be within the invite bubble for the Cologne Major by the April 6 VRS cutoff, meaning the majority of teams are now competing in their final tournament before the deadline.

3DMAX suffer significant fall from grace

3DMAX are guaranteed to miss the Major after elimination at Parken Challenger to B8. The series was a do-or-die series for the French roster, but they fell harrowingly flat in maps 2 and 3 in two 13-3 defeats to crash out of contention.

3DMAX are the most unexpected team to miss the major so far. The roster spent much of last year in the top 10, initially with Bryan ‘Maka’ Canda IGLing, then under Filip ‘Graviti’ Brankovic.

The latter experiment looked promising at first, but later fell flat with Maka returning to the IGL role this year and Kévin ‘misutaaa’ Rabier joining over loaned-out Alexandre ‘bodyy’ Pianaro.

The roster’s previous floor seemingly collapsed early in the year, as vital events to earn VRS points passed them by.

The roster will undoubtedly look back on the B8 series with regret, but in truth, it was their losses to FOKUS, Phantom, and two losses to Bestia at these local LANs that really put them on the back foot due to the Head-to-Head Elo element of the VRS model.

Those local LAN losses, combined with a loss of form in Tier 1 competition, mean that 3DMAX will not be playing the IEM Cologne 2026 Major.

B8, Monte, and M80 secure spots at IEM Cologne 2026 Major

B8’s victory over 3DMAX was the final piece of the puzzle the roster needed to guarantee their place at the Major.

Despite struggling with the AWP position after the decision to bench Danyyl ‘headtr1ck’ Valitov, the roster has done enough with 16-year-old Tier 1 rookie Daniil ‘s1zzi’ Vinnyk.

The roster’s advantage over their rivals largely came from a huge swing due to their Pro League Season 23 win over FURIA. The roster’s 2-1 series victory vastly elevated their ‘Bounty Collected’ in the VRS, a measurement of the strength of the teams you defeated.

For M80, DracuLan Season 6 was finally when the roster managed to come together after a series of difficult exists. The decision to add Josh ‘JBa’ Barutt over Jadan ‘HexT’ Postma had not paid off on European soil until their DraculaN victory.

It was a strong run from M80, defeating Liquid, Aurora, and Alliance before getting revenge on Monte in the Grand Final.

For Monte, the main goal had already been completed by the time the Grand Final had started. The major is Monte’s first since its move to international rosters, away from their Ukrainian roots, representing a significant achievement for the org.

According to VRS expert Finn ‘Mischief’ Farrer, GamerLegion’s slim chances of missing the major have also been eradicated, with the roster set to face G2 in the Upper Final of Stake Ranked Ep 1.

Who do you want to make the Major? Discuss that on our Discord!
For more VRS shenanigans, see why FaZe still have a chance to qualify.

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For April 3, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, April 3, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Used in cooking
  • Hint 2: Earthy spice
  • Hint 3: Popular in Indian, Mexican and Middle Eastern cuisine

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Cardamom
  • Garlic
  • Clove
  • Chili
  • Cilantro
  • Turmeric
  • Oregano
  • Paprika
  • Coriander

Today’s Contexto Answer For April 3, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Cumin

Cumin is derived from a small plant, Cuminum cyminum, which hails from the parsley family. It bears aromatic, seedlike fruit, which is used in cooking and medicine.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on April 4.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more word game guides, check out the following:

  • NYT Connections
  • Wordle

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Kyle Crane’s Hunger Calms Down in New Dying Light: The Beast Update
item.content:encoded:
Last week, Dying Light: The Beast received a major update dubbed ‘Restored Land’. It’s an all-new edition of the game that comes with a slew of extra content, including a fresh side mode of the same name. In Restored Land, players can eliminate every infected in the game, eventually clearing out the map, but every resource is finite, and there are more survival mechanics.

One of those mechanics is hunger, and following complaints that it was too oppressive, Techland has made some changes.

Kyle Crane Was Too Damn Hungry

Restored Land has arrived mere months after the launch of Dying Light: The Beast, the latest iteration in the legendary zombie apocalypse series and the title that kick-starts the next generation of the franchise.

This new mode, which also serves as a full SKU replacement, allows players to literally restore the land, eliminating all the undead enemies across Castor Woods and rendering the game world clean of infection.

To get there, they’ll need to manage hunger, exhaustion, and limited resources, including batteries for their in-game torch and UV light. It’s a tougher mode that caters more to the survival crowd, that’s for sure.

Following feedback that Kyle Crane, the game’s protagonist, was getting hungry far too quickly and feeling the ramifications of that fact, Techland has made some key changes with a new hotfix:

  • Reduced hunger drain when sleeping
  • Slower overall hunger depletion
  • “Very Hungry” and “Famished” states now trigger later
  • Vendors now offer improvised food bars

Additionally, the hotfix targets dozens of bugs with the new update, and some difficulty aspects were tweaked. For instance, lower-level chases with infected enemies have been made ‘slightly easier to escape.’

The full patch notes are available on Steam.

Have you been enjoying Restored Land? Let us know on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that Take-Two has laid off an AI department

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

item.title: Take-Two Lays Off Head of AI and Shakes Up Department
item.content:encoded:
In a recent post on social media, the former Head of AI at Take-Two Interactive revealed they’d been laid off by the firm. The company, which is the parent organization of GTA 6 developer Rockstar, has reportedly made a major shake-up in the AI department, laying off an unknown number of employees.

This news comes mere months ahead of the launch of Grand Theft Auto 6, widely anticipated and thought of by many as the most important game ever made.

‘It’s Truly Disappointing’

In a post on LinkedIn, Luke Dicken, former Head of AI at Take-Two Interactive, wrote:

It’s truly disappointing that I have to share with you that my time with T2 – and that of my team – has come to an end.

I will take the time in a week or so to make a more reflective post on my time with Zynga and T2, but for right now I would appreciate your help in finding these awesome talented folks new positions…

We’ve been developing cutting edge technology to support game development now for 7 years. These folks know how to match innovation and novel problem solving approaches with strong product design chops to create systems that empower people throughout the development workflow.

It’s not clear how many people were in Luke’s team, or why Take-Two Interactive has opted to let them go from their positions, but it’s an indication of a scaling back of AI development at the titan company.

This isn’t the first time Take-Two has made layoffs in recent years. As the wider industry adjusted in 2024, the company laid off five percent of its workforce and called off some developing projects, all in the name of financial efficiency.

Recently, the CEO of Take-Two, Strauss Zelnick, went on record stating that artificial intelligence could never produce a game like GTA 6, and he has regularly spoken in favor of human development.

Are you surprised that Take-Two has made this major change? Let us know your thoughts on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that The Last of Us Online was so close to being revealed

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

item.title: Marathon Devs Announce Recon Changes Ahead of Next Patch
item.content:encoded:
The developers of Marathon have a major update scheduled for April 14. However, they have some notable changes they want to share with players early so players get a sense of what’s coming.

The changes shared are related specifically to the Recon Shell. Ahead of the full release of passion notes for version 1.0.6, the Bungie developers have shared changes coming to Echo Pulse and Tracker Drone.

Marathon Recon Updates Coming on April 14

In a Twitter post, the Marathon Dev Team shared that the echo pulse ability will have its visibility to enemies reduced. This should make it harder for enemies to gauge whether they’re within range of an attack. Also, if you’re a Runner who has used a Signal Jammer before the Echo Pulse, you’ll appear as UESC.

For the Tracker Drone, they promised that this ability will get more aggressive. In the next patch, they are increasing the drones’ tracking strength and allowing them to find a new target if they can’t reach the initial one.

The developers have confirmed that they plan on supporting the game for many years. Players can read their comments here. For more on Marathon, check out our full review of the game at this link.

Also, you can check out the notes from the previous patch at this link.

Have you begun playing Marathon yet? If so, what are your thoughts on the game? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Pokémon Pokopia-Inspired Experience Opens in London
item.content:encoded:
A Pokémon Pokopia-inspired experience has opened in central London.

Pokémon Pokopia is a game exclusive to the Nintendo Switch 2 and has quickly taken over many players’ lives. A game that takes elements from Dragon Quest Builders, Minecraft, and Animal Crossing, the game has quickly become the best-selling Pokémon spin-off game of all time.

Pokémon Pokopia Immersive Space Opens at ‘The Mount’

Pokopia Garden is now open in Acton, London. Opening on March 31, the experience is free to the public and will be open for the next 6 months until September 30. An Instagram post notes that it was created in collaboration with local businesses and features a curated section of plants alongside Pokémon-inspired terrariums.

“Open Pokémon GO to find a special PokéStop and Gym too,” the post encourages players. It’s also noted that Pokopia plushes will be available at the Pokémon Center in the UK this summer.

Pokémon Pokopia Proves to Be A Killer App for the Nintendo Switch 2

Pokémon Pokopia has not only become a standout seller in the world of Pokémon, but it’s also become a premier reason for players to pick up the Nintendo Switch successor.

As players continue to wait for a new 3D Mario experience and the first Legend of Zelda experience on the Switch 2, Pokopia stands beside Donkey Kong Bananza as a top-tier exclusive game for the new Switch.

Learn more about the future of the Nintendo console and the potential return of Star Fox here.

Have you started playing Pokopia? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

item.title: Free Amazon Luna Games For April 2026 Revealed
item.content:encoded:
Check out the slew of free games that will be available for free via the Amazon Luna service.

Unlike other gaming launchers, Luna also allows players to connect their GOG and Epic Games Store accounts. Free games for the month include several titles from those services, including XCOM: Enemy Unknown from GOG and Total War: Pharaoh Dynasties from Epic.

Other free games to claim throughout the month include Monster Harvest from the Epic Games Store and Pinball Spire from GOG. The full list of free games will be below.

Amazon Luna’s Claim Games for April 2026

April 2

  • XCOM: Enemy Unknown Complete Pack
  • Total War: Pharaoh Dynasties

April 9

  • A Rat’s Quest: The Way Back Home
  • King of Retail

April 16

  • Snake Core
  • Monster Harvest
  • Detective Agency: Gray Tie Collector’s Edition

April 23

  • Neo Cab
  • The Pale Beyond

April 30

  • KinnikuNeko: Super Muscle Cat
  • Fantasy General
  • Pinball Spire

Other free games available right now include Tiny Tina’s Wonderland and Sid Meier’s Civilization 6. Amazon Prime subscribers get access to standard Amazon Luna subscriptions, and premium ones start at $9.99 per month.

Games such as Dave the Diver and Indiana Jones and the Great Circle are also available on the service. Even Sega’s greatest mascot, Sonic the Hedgehog, has multiple games on the platform for premium subscribers.

For more free games from the month of April, check out what’s coming on PlayStation Plus.

How do you feel about these free games? Do you subscribe to Amazon Luna? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

PlayStation Games on PC Took 3 Years to Earn $300M

The LinkedIn account of a former PlayStation employee offers new insights into how PlayStation generated profits by bringing its games to PC.

Sony Announces Acquisition of Cinemersive Labs

Sony will be acquiring Cinemersive Labs and moving them to their Visual Computing Group. Here are more details.

Raven Software Co-Founder Brian Raffel Announces Retirement

Raven Software’s co-founder has announced his retirement after spending 36 years at the helm. Here are more details.

Xbox FanFest Tour is Coming to 8 Cities in 2026

Xbox has announced that the FanFest Tour for the 25th Anniversary will be arriving to 8 cities. Here are more details.

item.title: NYT Connections Hints Today (#1027)—Answers for Friday, April 3
item.content:encoded:
It’s the end of another week, but hopefully that NYT Connections streak is still going strong! As you coast into the weekend (which is Easter, if you happen to celebrate), go safe in the knowledge that you’ve got the best NYT Connections hints and answers, right here. In the guide below, I’ve outlined everything you need to know to beat today’s puzzle.

Just read on to get today’s NYT Connections hints and solutions!

How to Play NYT Connections

In June 2023, NYT Connections emerged as yet another game in the ever-growing lineup of the New York Times titles. This title soared immediately, and it’s easy to see why. As a free-to-play, accessible New York Times game, NYT Connections is available worldwide and can be played on desktop devices or in a mobile app.

But how do you play NYT Connections?

The NYT team will provide you with a grid of 16 words once a day. The only task left up to you is to sort those words into four groups of four by finding their commonalities. Every NYT Connections puzzle has just one solution, and some words can have double meanings, so it can sometimes be tricky to figure out the answers.

It’s also important to stress that the words are color-coded: yellow, blue, green, and purple. That’s in order of difficulty, from least to most.

What’s critical here is that you get four guesses every day, and if you use those, your NYT Connections answers for today will be out of reach, as it’ll be game over.

Today’s NYT Connections Hints (April 3)

Here are the words from today’s NYT Connections puzzle:

  • PETTY
  • CRUISE
  • LONG
  • ZOMBIE
  • HURRICANE
  • JONES
  • GROUND
  • COLLINS
  • MISSION
  • SMALL
  • LUST
  • SNIDE
  • MEAN
  • THIRST
  • DAMAGE
  • ROCKS

And here are the hints I can offer for today’s NYT Connections:

  • Yellow – Words you might associate with childish behavior
  • Green – Words to describe wanting something real bad
  • Blue – Different types of cocktail glasses
  • Purple – Words that can go before ‘control’

Here’s the final warning before we get to the NYT Connections answers for today, April 3:

Are you sure you want to scroll further?

Very well!

NYT Connections Answers Explained for Today, April 3 (#1027)

If you want to jump straight to the answers for today’s NYT Connections puzzle, I’ve got you covered:

  • Yellow – MEAN, PETTY, SMALL, SNIDE
  • Green – JONES, LONG, LUST, THIRST
  • Blue – COLLINS, HURRICANE, ROCKS, ZOMBIE
  • Purple – CRUISE, DAMAGE, GROUND, MISSION

When Does NYT Connections Reset?

That’s today’s puzzle, but if you want the next one, the game resets daily at midnight local time (that’s your local time). You’ll have 24 hours to complete the puzzle when midnight ticks over in your timezone.

How did you do? Did you get a perfect run? Let me know what your streak looks like on the Insider Gaming Discord server

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP
